import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{useNavigate,useParams}from'react-router-dom';import blogService from'../../services/blogService';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function EditBlog(){const{slug}=useParams();const[blog,setBlog]=useState(null);const[title,setTitle]=useState('');const[excerpt,setExcerpt]=useState('');const[content,setContent]=useState('');const[status,setStatus]=useState('draft');const[featuredImage,setFeaturedImage]=useState(null);const navigate=useNavigate();useEffect(()=>{const loadBlog=async()=>{try{const data=await blogService.fetchBlogBySlugAdmin(slug);setBlog(data);setTitle(data.title);setExcerpt(data.excerpt);setContent(data.content);setStatus(data.status);}catch(error){setBlog(null);}};loadBlog();},[slug]);const handleSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();try{await blogService.updateBlog(blog._id,{title,excerpt,content,status,featuredImage});navigate('/admin/manage-blogs');}catch{// ignore
}};if(!blog){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Loading blog data\u2026"});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{maxWidth:'720px',padding:'1rem',background:'#fff',borderRadius:'12px'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Edit Blog"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,style:{display:'grid',gap:'1rem'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("label",{children:["Title",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{value:title,onChange:e=>setTitle(e.target.value),required:true})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("label",{children:["Excerpt",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("textarea",{value:excerpt,onChange:e=>setExcerpt(e.target.value),required:true})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("label",{children:["Content",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("textarea",{value:content,onChange:e=>setContent(e.target.value),required:true,rows:6})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("label",{children:["Status",/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("select",{value:status,onChange:e=>setStatus(e.target.value),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:"draft",children:"Draft"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:"published",children:"Published"})]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("label",{children:["Featured Image",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"file",onChange:e=>setFeaturedImage(e.target.files[0])})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"Update Blog"})]})]});}export default EditBlog;
